title: Add missing high-traffic flows to Varys's routing table
learning: Varys's own routing.md — read before every task — listed only 9 agents but 5 major documented flows (taleemabad-bug-agent, product-lead, code-reviewer, job-agent, escalation-broker) were absent, forcing free-solo or wrong-agent picks; the routing playbook must enumerate every routable agent that exists in .claude/agents/.
summary: EXTENDED routing.md: added 5 routing rows (taleemabad-bug-agent, product-lead, code-reviewer, job-agent, escalation-broker) plus a most-focused-row-wins tiebreaker note disambiguating generic code-agent from scoped taleemabad-bug-agent. All added agents verified to exist as files in .claude/agents/. Distinct from the 2026-06-29 friction-radar edit the gate reverted.

title: Add Safe Auto-Remediation Loops guardrails to harness-evolution skill
learning: The self-healing-loop failure (2026-06-01: amplified bugs via no idempotency, unverified auto-fix, and observer self-matching) had no home in any skill — codifying it beside 'automate as hook' guidance is where it will actually be read before the next auto-remediation loop is built.
summary: Extended harness-evolution.md with a 'Safe Auto-Remediation Loops' section codifying the four gates (detection must not match the observer, verify error is current before acting, no unreviewed auto-edit→commit, idempotent by construction) from the 2026-06-01 self-healing-loop failure. Skipped the friction-radar and skills-router learnings — both were already attempted and gate-reverted (06-29, 06-30). File verified: 94 lines, starts with '# Harness Evolution', no broken path references.
